prompt.asset_type: website dashboard hero background for a multiplayer board game
prompt.primary_request: Create an original elemental companion arena for a Splendor-inspired online board game. Show a polished tabletop arena with glowing gem-like energy tokens in five elements: fire, water, grass, electric, and psychic. Include a few small original fantasy companion silhouettes around the table, but do not resemble or reference any existing Pokemon characters. No logos, no readable text, no watermarks.
prompt.constraints: Original IP only; no official Pokemon, Splendor, Nintendo, or Asmodee marks; no text; no UI labels.
